264	# Standard PATH entries for environments with minimal PATH (e.g. systemd services).
265	# Includes macOS Homebrew paths (/opt/homebrew/* for Apple Silicon).
266	_SANE_PATH = (
267	    "/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:"
268	    "/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
269	)
270	
271	
272	def _make_run_env(env: dict) -> dict:
273	    """Build a run environment with a sane PATH and provider-var stripping."""
274	    try:
275	        from tools.env_passthrough import is_env_passthrough as _is_passthrough
276	    except Exception:
277	        _is_passthrough = lambda _: False  # noqa: E731
278	
279	    merged = dict(os.environ | env)
280	    run_env = {}
281	    for k, v in merged.items():
282	        if k.startswith(_HERMES_PROVIDER_ENV_FORCE_PREFIX):
283	            real_key = k[len(_HERMES_PROVIDER_ENV_FORCE_PREFIX):]
284	            run_env[real_key] = v
285	        elif k not in _HERMES_PROVIDER_ENV_BLOCKLIST or _is_passthrough(k):
286	            run_env[k] = v
287	    existing_path = run_env.get("PATH", "")
288	    if "/usr/bin" not in existing_path.split(":"):
289	        run_env["PATH"] = f"{existing_path}:{_SANE_PATH}" if existing_path else _SANE_PATH
290	    return run_env
